scripts.build: npm run build -w epubcheck-ts && npm run build -w app/server && npm run build -w app/client
scripts.test: npm test -w app/server && npm test -w app/client
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:watch -w app/server & npm run test:watch -w app/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w app/server && npm run lint -w app/client
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w app/server && npm run lint:fix -w app/client
